name: Mountain Road — Blizzard
description: A narrow mountain road through dense, snow-laden forest. The blizzard reduces visibility to 30 feet. The wind howls between the trees. The sun is setting, turning what little light remains a bruised purple. The road ahead curves toward a faint orange glow — the Pallid Hart inn.

zones.name: Road — South Bend
zones.note: Where PCs enter from the south. Thick trees on both sides.

zones.name: Road — Forest Stretch
zones.note: Dense forest. Wolves howl in the distance. Shadows move between trees.

zones.name: Road — Inn Approach
zones.note: The road widens. A faint warm glow visible ahead through the snow.

zones.name: Pallid Hart — Exterior
zones.note: The inn looms out of the blizzard. A weathered sign creaks. Light leaks from shuttered windows.

zones.name: Dark Treeline — West
zones.note: Impenetrable trees. Something watches from the darkness.

zones.name: Dark Treeline — East
zones.note: A brief break in the trees reveals claw marks gouged into bark at eye height.

zones.name: Clearing — Dead Animal
zones.note: A deer carcass, completely drained of blood. No tracks around it despite the fresh snow.

dire-wolf-alpha.name: Dire Wolf (Alpha)
dire-wolf-alpha.note: Pack leader, will not attack unless provoked

environmentRules.temperature: extreme cold — DC 10 Constitution save each hour or gain 1 level of exhaustion
